/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libgstmvfacerecognizer.so -o ../../gst-plugins/libgstmvfacerecognizer.so CMakeFiles/gstmvfacerecognizer.dir/gstmvfacerecognizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gstmvfacerecognizer.dir/mv_face_recognition_meta.cpp.o   -L/opt/nvidia/deepstream/deepstream-9.0/lib  -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/nvidia/deepstream/deepstream-9.0/lib:/usr/local/cuda-13.1/targets/x86_64-linux/lib -lgstbase-1.0 -lgstreamer-1.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 /usr/local/cuda-13.1/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcudart.so -lnvds_meta -lnvdsgst_meta -lnvds_utils ../../libmergenvision_recognition.a ../../libmergenvision_kernels.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libnvinfer.so -lcjson /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/local/cuda-13.1/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcudart.so -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
